Local lcDpd, laDir, lnDir, llOks, lcChr

lcDeq = Alltrim(crsigcdpam.CdChepSais)
lcDeq = Iif(Right(lcDeq, 1)=[\], lcDeq, lcDeq + [\])
llOks = .F.
lcChr = CHR(13) + CHR(10)

lcArq = lcDeq + [estoque.xml]
IF FILE(lcArq)
	DELETE FILE &lcArq
ENDIF

*** mena 27/04/2016 - incluido o campo IPI no select para colocar no xml ***
